title: dendranthema littorale subsp. coreanum
intro: Dendranthema littorale subsp. coreanum, also known as Korean chrysanthemum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Dendranthema littorale subsp. coreanum include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, are commonly used in traditional Korean medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent illnesses.
